channel.title: Fruit on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Fruit on Nature Works

item.title: Blueberry
item.description:
Northern Highbush Blueberry species for a woodland bed in a local garden

I‘m planting up the Rhug garden, the woodland beds, and I’m putting in a few Northern Highbush Blueberry (Vaccinium corymbosum) bushes. http://localhost:1313/blog/230131-blueberry/

item.title: Fruit colour
item.description:
Most attractive fruit colours to birds

In descending order of attractiveness: Purple Red Orange Black (mulberries) Via Martin Crawford’s course. http://localhost:1313/fruit-colour/
